channel.title: Github on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Github on Arrans github.io

item.title: blackwell-systems/shelfctl
item.description: PDF/EPUB library CLI/TUI backed by GitHub Release assets (Git LFS alternative). On-demand per-file downloads, metadata catalog, migrate/split bloated repos.

item.title: dlvhdr/gh-dash
item.description: A rich terminal UI for GitHub that doesn’t break your flow.

item.title: dlvhdr/diffnav
item.description: A git diff pager based on delta but with a file tree, à la GitHub.

item.title: lowlighter/metrics
item.description: 📊 An infographics generator with 30+ plugins and 300+ options to display stats about your GitHub account and render them as SVG, Markdown, PDF or JSON!

item.title: johnwarne/upvote-rss
item.description: Generate rich RSS feeds from Reddit, Hacker News, Lemmy, Mbin, and more

item.title: github-aws-runners/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS

item.title: arran4/kgithub-notify
item.description: A sleek GitHub notification system tray application written natively in C++ using Qt6 and KDE Frameworks 6 (KF6). It quietly monitors your GitHub account, notifying you when there are new notifications, and provides a rich desktop interface to manage themGithub notifier for KDE

item.title: arran4/gobookmarks
item.description: Landing page for when you open browsers / live bookmarks in go.

item.title: Tanq16/backhub
item.description: Backhub helps maintain backups of multiple GitHub repos as full local mirrors.

item.title: muesli/gitty
item.description: Contextual information about your git projects, right on the command-line

item.title: BandarLabs/gitpodcast
item.description: Convert any git repository into an engaging podcast

item.title: cool-calm/collected-press
item.description: Render Markdown from any public GitHub repo or gist
